---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: 'feat(): '
labels: enhancement
assignees: 'chitrank2050'
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Describe the pain point.

## Proposed solution

How should this work? Be specific about the CLI flags, configuration schema, or behavior.

## CLI / Config Design (if applicable)

```bash
# Example CLI usage
git-hygiene new-command --flag value
```

```json
// Example package.json config
{
  "git-hygiene": {
    "newSetting": true
  }
}
```

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you consider and why did you reject them?

## Additional context

References to similar features in other tools, or links to related issues.
